files.text:
defmodule MyApp.External do
  def fetch(url) do
    HTTP.get!(url)
  rescue
    error in [HTTP.Error] ->
      Logger.error("upstream failure: #{inspect(error)}")
      raise MyApp.UpstreamError, "failed to reach #{url}"
  end
end

defmodule MyApp.External do
  def fetch(url) do
    HTTP.get!(url)
  rescue
    error in [HTTP.Error] ->
      Logger.error("upstream failure: #{inspect(error)}")
      reraise error, __STACKTRACE__
  end
end
